svg.text: Scans CLAUDE.md · ADRs · git log · test health
git log · stash · WIP markers · test health
→ Yesterday / Today / Blockers — ready to paste
Blast radius audit · risk matrix LOW→CRITICAL
→ phased plan with rollback per phase
Context · options · decision · consequences · revisit trigger
Never guess · hypothesis before code · one fix at a time · escalate after 3 failed hypotheses
Loops until all checks are green — never use --no-verify
→ blocks commit if lint or tests fail
